subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who revealeth the verses as He willeth. He, verily, is the All-Powerful, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. O servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات کیف یشاء و انه لهو المقتدر المهیمن القیوم ان یا عبد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
